name: Shed Hunting
mission: Winter wildlife sign, deer ecology, and the ethics of patient searching — not a standalone product.
portfolioNote: Shed Hunting becomes a seasonal winter wildlife and deer ecology learning track on the regional dashboard and ForageCast — not a separate seven-room app.
learnToday: Why deer drop antlers in late winter — nutrition, testosterone, and terrain
Reading south-facing slopes and bedding cover without disturbing wintering wildlife
Ethics: empty-handed miles still produce evidence — tracks, browse, rubs, and bedding sign
Why Waypoint will not build leaderboards, exact find maps, or trophy gamification
comingSoon: Winter track lessons on the regional dashboard
Fieldry template for sign encounters and empty-day walks
Optional anonymous county-level phenology — never den or shed coordinates

preview.title: The quiet search
preview.description: Patience as a field skill. This concept is preserved as a learning track — teaching sign reading and wildlife ethics without implying a finished app exists today.
